title: AdapterScaffold
description: Interface contract for Parix LLM and channel adapters.

provider_id.description: Unique provider identifier registered in the adapter registry.

type.description: Adapter category: llm for language models, channel for notification targets.

env_keys.description: Environment variable names required for this adapter.

complete.description: LLM adapters: complete(request) -> response. Required when type is llm.

send.description: Channel adapters: send(payload) -> result. Required when type is channel.

fallback_order.description: Position in the router fallback chain. Lower values are tried first.
